productDisplayName: Nike Men's As Kill Man T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack crew neck short sleeved t-shirt  made of 100% cotton, with grey fabric tape on inseam of the neckline and graphic print on the frontFittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not bleach Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron, but do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean While some people are repulsed by skulls, you'll love them in this black nike t-shirt! The large skull in sandy white on the front with the word "kill" printed along with the brand logo is a tribute to your gothic side. Team this with jeans and lifestyle shoes for that uber cool look during weekend parties.
